summary: Phase 41 polish + Phase 42 margin engine testing complete. All backend APIs pass (8/8). Frontend features working: Track Order page with email/phone guidance and helper text, Order Confirmation with guest tracking reminder, Admin Distribution Margin page with blue info banner (fixed vs flexible), red warning when split exceeds cap, margin rules table with 4 rules, Add Override Rule form. Products page loads, Login page shows full logo, Customer login works. Admin sidebar does NOT show 'Margin & Distribution' link - the link is defined in adminNavigation.js but AdminLayout.js uses a different navItems array that doesn't include it.

issues: 'Margin & Distribution' link is defined in adminNavigation.js (line 60) but AdminLayout.js uses a different navItems array (lines 61-101) that doesn't include it. The page is accessible via direct URL /admin/distribution-margin but not visible in sidebar navigation. Need to add { path: '/admin/distribution-margin', label: 'Margin & Distribution', icon: Percent, moduleKey: 'partners' } to navItems in AdminLayout.js

action_items: Add 'Margin & Distribution' link to navItems array in AdminLayout.js (around line 91 in Partnerships section): { path: '/admin/distribution-margin', label: 'Margin & Distribution', icon: Percent, moduleKey: 'partners' }
critical_code_review_comments: Two navigation configs exist: adminNavigation.js and navItems in AdminLayout.js - they should be consolidated or synced
AdminSidebar.jsx uses adminNavigation.js but AdminLayout.js uses its own navItems array - this causes inconsistency
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 41-42 testing complete. Backend margin engine APIs fully functional: GET/POST margin-rules, resolve-distribution with hierarchy (product > group > global). Frontend: Track Order has email/phone guidance, Order Confirmation has guest tracking reminder, Admin Distribution Margin page has blue info banner, red warning on invalid split, margin rules table with CRUD. Only issue: sidebar link not visible in AdminLayout.js navItems.

track_order_page_helper_text.description: Track Order page has helper text 'Use the order code shown after checkout...'
track_order_page_helper_text.evidence: Text found under order number input

track_order_page_email_phone_guidance.description: Track Order page has 'Verify with your email or phone number' guidance

order_confirmation_guest_reminder.description: Order Confirmation shows guest tracking reminder
order_confirmation_guest_reminder.evidence: Text 'You'll need this order code to track your order as a guest' found

admin_distribution_blue_info_banner.description: Admin Distribution Margin page has blue info banner explaining fixed vs flexible margins
admin_distribution_blue_info_banner.evidence: 'Fixed Margin' and 'Flexible Distribution' text found in blue banner

admin_distribution_red_warning.description: Admin Distribution Margin page shows red warning when split exceeds cap
admin_distribution_red_warning.evidence: Set affiliate=8%, sales=5%, discount=5% (18% total) and 'Over-allocated' warning appeared

margin_rules_api_list.evidence: Returns array of rules with all fields

margin_rules_api_resolve_distribution.evidence: Group rule (18%/8%) beats global, product rule (25%/12%) beats group

margin_rules_api_canonical_pricing.description: resolve-distribution returns canonical pricing object with all fields
margin_rules_api_canonical_pricing.evidence: Returns base_price, effective_margin_pct/value, effective_distributable_margin_pct/value, sales/affiliate/discount amounts, final_price, rule_scope/label

admin_margin_rules_table.description: Admin Distribution Margin page shows margin rules table
admin_margin_rules_table.evidence: Found 4 margin rule rows (Office Equipment, Electronics, Test Product, Global)

admin_margin_rules_add_form.description: Admin Distribution Margin page has Add Override Rule form
admin_margin_rules_add_form.evidence: Scope select, label input, margin %, distributable %, Add Rule button all found

admin_sidebar_margin_link.description: Admin sidebar shows 'Margin & Distribution' link in Growth section
admin_sidebar_margin_link.evidence: Link defined in adminNavigation.js but AdminLayout.js uses different navItems array without this link

login_page_logo.description: Login page renders properly with full logo

customer_login.description: Customer login with demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123! works
